rules.title: Classify claims using MC094_TypeOfClaim and bill type
rules.body: Use MC094_TypeOfClaim and MC036_TypeOfBill_Institutional to classify each claim as Inpatient facility, Outpatient facility, Professional, or Other. INP/OUT/PTB map directly; '002' claims are further split by bill type prefix (11 = inpatient, 13/14 = outpatient); '001' = professional.
